nasb.text: All their evil is at Gilgal; Indeed, I came to hate them there! Because of the wickedness of their deeds I will drive them out of My house! I will love them no more; All their princes are rebels.

esv.text: Every evil of theirs is in Gilgal; there I began to hate them. Because of the wickedness of their deeds I will drive them out of my house. I will love them no more; all their princes are rebels.

cnv.text: “他們的一切罪惡都在吉甲， 我在那裡憎恨他們， 因他們的惡行， 我要把他們從我的家裡趕出來； 我不再愛他們， 他們的領袖都是叛徒。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “因他们在吉甲的一切恶行， 我已憎恶他们。 因他们的恶行， 我要将他们逐出我的家， 不再爱他们， 他们的首领都是悖逆之人。
